ai-check.description: Run the full strict Iris AI harness gate.
ai-check.template: Run `make ai-check`. Keep failures visible. Do not weaken quality gates. Summarize the first failures and next fixes in Japanese.

ai-quick.description: Run the fast strict Iris AI harness gate.
ai-quick.template: Run `make ai-quick`. Fix root causes for lint, format, type, pyright, and architecture failures. Do not relax config.

ai-arch.description: Run architecture guard tests and analyze boundary failures.
ai-arch.template: Read `.agents/workflows/architecture.md`, then run `make ai-arch`. Explain any boundary violation and the smallest safe fix.

ai-report.description: Generate a compact Japanese completion report skeleton.
ai-report.template: Run `make ai-report`, then fill in the report with actual checks run, failures, and residual risk.

ai-review.description: Review the current diff without editing files.
ai-review.template: Review the current diff against AGENTS.md, `.agents/rules/architecture.md`, `.agents/rules/ai-harness.md`, and `.agents/rules/verification.md`. Do not edit files. Report risks and missing tests in Japanese.
